metadata.title:
LAW


OPPOSED

Spokane Labor Takes Ac.
ton Against Price Tags


for Injuries.

pages.raw_text:
A resolution emphatically oppos.
ing Senator Graves ~employers'
minimum liability bill was adopted
at a meeting of the Central Labor
council last night and c. r. Case,
president-elect of the State Fed
Grafton of Labor, who has the in
terests Of organized labor in
charge at Olympia, will be urged
to an effort to kill the bill.


The resolution was unanimously
adopted, as the general feeling
among the labor unions of the
city is that no bill of this kind
should be passed to set out just
how much damage should be
awarded by the courts to a man
who has been disabled by accident.


The woman's suffrage amend
ment was endorsed and resolu-
